name: Sendcloud European Shipping Automation API
what_it_does: Sendcloud European shipping automation REST API for e-commerce merchants to compare carrier rates, create shipping labels, print parcel labels, track shipments, and manage returns across 80+ carriers in the Netherlands, Belgium, Germany, France, UK, Italy, Spain, Austria, and other European markets — a Zendesk-backed shipping software platform serving 25,000+ European online retailers. Enables AI agents to manage carrier selection for multi-carrier rate comparison automation, handle parcel creation for shipping label automation, access label printing for fulfillment workflow automation, retrieve tracking data for shipment status automation, manage return portal for reverse logistics automation, handle address validation for delivery accuracy automation, access brand tracking page for customer communication automation, retrieve carrier announcement for service alert automation, manage warehouse integration for pick-pack-ship automation, and integrate Sendcloud with Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, and ERP systems for end-to-end European e-commerce shipping automation.
use_cases: Comparing carrier rates and creating shipping labels for European e-commerce order fulfillment automation agents
Automating parcel handover to 80+ carriers for multi-carrier shipping strategy optimization agents
Generating branded tracking pages and delivery notifications for customer experience automation agents
Managing returns and reverse logistics for European e-commerce post-purchase automation agents
not_for: Same-day on-demand delivery (Sendcloud is planned parcel shipping, not instant courier)
International freight and pallet shipping (Sendcloud is parcel-level e-commerce shipping)
Non-European markets primarily (Sendcloud is European carrier network focused)
best_when: A European e-commerce merchant wanting AI agents to automate multi-carrier shipping label creation, rate comparison, tracking, and returns across Sendcloud's 80+ carrier network in the Netherlands, Germany, France, UK, and other European markets.
avoid_when: SENDCLOUD ACCOUNT REQUIRED FOR CARRIER CONTRACTS: Sendcloud provides carrier access through its own contracts; automated own carrier account assumption creates wrong API authentication approach; automated must use Sendcloud's carrier credentials via Sendcloud API. LABEL CREATION IS FINAL: Sendcloud shipping labels cannot be modified after creation; automated label-with-errors creates waste label and potential shipping problem; automated must validate all parcel data before label creation. CARRIER-SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS: Different carriers have different parcel requirements (weight limits, dimensions, customs forms for international); automated uniform parcel specification creates carrier-specific validation errors; automated must check carrier requirements before label creation. WEBHOOK SETUP IS MANUAL: Sendcloud webhook URL configuration requires setup in Sendcloud dashboard; automated programmatic webhook configuration is limited; automated webhook endpoint must be pre-configured in dashboard.

auth.notes: Sendcloud uses API key + secret (HTTP Basic auth) for authentication. REST API with JSON. Eindhoven, Netherlands HQ. Founded 2012 by Rob van den Heuvel, Sabi Tolou, and Bas Smeulders. Backed by HV Capital, Endeit Capital ($177M raised). Products: Multi-carrier shipping, label printing, tracking, returns portal, brand tracking page, address validation. SDKs: PHP, Python, Node.js. 80+ carriers: DHL, UPS, PostNL, DPD, GLS, FedEx, and others. 25,000+ EU merchants. Competes with Shippo and EasyPost for European shipping automation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: up to 50 parcels/month, limited carriers; paid plans from €45/month
pricing.paid_tiers: Lite €45/month, Growth €89/month, Premium €179/month; Enterprise: negotiated; per-shipment discounts via Sendcloud contracts
pricing.notes: Eindhoven NL. HV Capital backed. Subscription + per-shipment. Free tier available. EU carrier focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key tier; label creation throttled; webhooks for shipment events

known_agent_gotchas: BASIC AUTH WITH KEY:SECRET: Sendcloud uses HTTP Basic authentication with public_key:secret_key as username:password; automated bearer token assumption creates 401; automated must Base64 encode public_key:secret_key for Authorization header

CARRIER SELECTION IS REQUIRED: Sendcloud label creation requires specifying carrier and service_point or shipping method; automated auto-carrier selection creates missing_shipping_method error; automated must select carrier and method before label creation

LABEL IS IMMUTABLE: Once Sendcloud label is created it cannot be modified; automated post-creation address correction creates waste label; automated must validate all shipment data (address, weight, dimensions) before calling create parcel

WEIGHT AND DIMENSION ACCURACY: Carrier billing adjusts to actual weight; automated inaccurate parcel dimensions creates carrier billing adjustment; automated should use accurate weight/dimensions to avoid reconciliation charges

WEBHOOK CONFIGURATION IN DASHBOARD: Sendcloud webhook endpoints must be configured in the Sendcloud dashboard, not programmatically via API; automated webhook registration attempt via API creates unsupported_operation; automated webhook URL must be pre-configured
agent_readiness.security_notes: Shipping automation. GDPR, PCI-DSS. HTTP Basic (API key+secret). EU/NL. Order and shipping address data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Shipping platform. GDPR, PCI-DSS. HTTP Basic auth. EU/NL. Customer shipping data.
